items.title: Four men held over child marriage in Sierra Leone appear in landmark court case
items.dek: It relates to a 17-year-old girl - four men including her father and husband face years in jail if convicted.
items.body: It relates to a 17-year-old girl - four men including her father and husband face years in jail if convicted.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Canada eligible to join Eurovision competition
items.dek: Prime Minister Mark Carney raised the idea of Canada joining the song contest in his 2025 budget.
items.body: Prime Minister Mark Carney raised the idea of Canada joining the song contest in his 2025 budget.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US sanctions Rwanda gold refinery accused of smuggling DR Congo's minerals
items.dek: The US alleges Gasabo Gold Refinery smuggled at least 60kg of gold in early 2026.
items.body: The US alleges Gasabo Gold Refinery smuggled at least 60kg of gold in early 2026.
items.author: IriLine Desk
